mean_en: a building, column, statue, etc. built to remind people of a famous person or event; a building that has special historical importance
sentence: The Washington Monument stands in the center of Washington, D.C.
sentence_trans: 华盛顿纪念碑矗立在华盛顿特区中心。
word_etyma: monu警告，提醒 + ment名词后缀 → 提醒的东西 → 纪念碑
